evidence_spans.span: 第一轮下调低库存权重，点击满意度从61%到66%
第二轮提升新品权重，满意度到69%；第三轮压低噪声标签，满意度到72%
今天想调整价格权重，目标75%，请给步骤

abstain_reason: legal convergence exclusion: object appears to be directly iterated via ranking/weight tuning, each prior step reports measurable primary-metric improvement, and no same-class symptom recurrence is shown beyond continued optimization toward target
